Video.summary: Clips and reminiscences show Sullivan and his 23-year variety series; host Burt Reynolds; the Beatles; Elvis Presley; the Rolling Stones; Tom Jones; Tina Turner; the Fifth Dimension; Harry Belafonte; the Byrds; Nat King Cole; Roy Orbison; Bob Hope.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
Video.title: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II

Image.alt: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show -- II

Video.summary: Host Mary Tyler Moore shows clips of Sullivan's 23-year variety series. With Milton Berle; John Byner; Jack Carter; Shecky Greene; Alan King; Shari Lewis; Rich Little; Dick Martin; Joan Rivers; Flip Wilson; Victor Borge.
Video.grandparentTitle: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
